changelog: v10.2.1: Fix hero content invisible with Reduce Motion (prefers-reduced-motion). All animated elements now get explicit opacity:1 fallback. SW cache bump to v10.2.1.

v10.2.1: Website aligned with actual codebase — 12 tools (EchoelSynth, EchoelFX, EchoelMix, EchoelSeq, EchoelMIDI, EchoelBio, EchoelVis, EchoelVid, EchoelLux, EchoelStage, EchoelNet, EchoelAI). Removed non-existent features from website. EngineBus → EchoelCreativeWorkspace.
v10.2.0: Generative Worlds + AR Worlds (EchoelVis), 3 Editions (Creative Suite, Research, SDK), 8 audience personas (was 4). EchoelToolkit.swift central reference.
v10.1.0: Fix stale '25 tools' references → 12 unified tools across manifest.json, version.json. Bump cache version, update build date.

v10.0.0: Engines consolidated into 12 unified Echoel* tools — EchoelSynth, EchoelFX, EchoelMix, EchoelSeq, EchoelMIDI, EchoelBio, EchoelVis, EchoelVid, EchoelLux, EchoelStage, EchoelNet, EchoelAI. OSC + Ableton Link networking.
v9.2.0: EchoelStage — external displays, AirPlay, projection, multi-screen, audience view.

v9.1.0: Enhanced DDSP (12 bio-mappings, spectral morphing, timbre transfer), Rausch-inspired bio-signal algorithms (BioEventGraph, HilbertSensorMapper, BioSignalDeconvolver), BioSignalDSP integrated into EchoelBio + EchoelVis, extended BioSnapshot, 56 test suites

v9.0.0: EchoelToolkit — consolidated into 12 unified Echoel* tools (EchoelSynth, EchoelFX, EchoelMix, EchoelSeq, EchoelMIDI, EchoelBio, EchoelVis, EchoelVid, EchoelLux, EchoelStage, EchoelNet, EchoelAI). Card-based tools section, updated specs and FAQ.
v8.0.1: Cache-busting query params on all assets, aggressive SW update checking, fixes CDN stale cache issue

v8.0.0: Complete CI rebuild — consistent nav/menu/footer on every page, zero inline styles on subpages, 1 CTA only (no page-cta, no mobile-cta, no Apple logos on subpages), shared.css as single source of truth
v7.1.0: Corporate Identity — pure grayscale on black, refined logo mark
v6.1.0: Inclusive font sizes + download CTA
